title: Review semantic memory integration for regressions and scope fidelity
description: Review the combined implementation for correctness, guardrail enforcement, backend compatibility, and adherence to the spec's single-database and namespace guarantees.
acceptance_criteria: Review verifies the implementation matches the spec's required CLI, runner env injection, onboarding, and planning ingestion behaviors.
Review checks for regressions in self-hosting and non-self-hosting takt command resolution.
Review confirms memory enforcement content is present in the intended guardrails and skill sources only.
Review produces a clear approval or needs-changes verdict with concrete findings if gaps remain.
